note: Partial/manual reconciliation — only pre_session + F1(10:00) stages were produced today; F2/F3 skipped. Grades computed from those two stages against the MNQ1_2026-04-21.json profile. Lessons target the LOD/close-extension miss on the F1 stage.

pre_session.invalidation_note: Pre-session named 'failure of any 10:00 reclaim OR repeated failed rallies after noon with expanding lower lows' — exact path that played out.

summary: Pre-session stage missed direction but correctly flagged its own invalidation (10:00 reclaim failure + failed afternoon rallies). F1 10:00 stage flipped to short and cleanly hit direction, structure, afternoon drive, close-near-extreme, HOD, and GOAT direction — but UNDER-ESTIMATED extension on the downside: projected close range missed by 85pts and projected LOD band missed by 120pts. Pattern: F1 conservative ranges bracket symmetrically, but trend-down liquidation days overshoot asymmetrically lower.
lessons: Close extension in trend-down liquidation days routinely breaks below F1's projected close range — extend the lower bound ~1.5x when close_near_extreme=near_low is the primary prediction
When F1 calls 'liquidation extension' as the afternoon drive, bias the LOD band lower than symmetric — late-session flushes 14:30-15:55 overshoot conservative ranges by 80-120 pts on MNQ1!

Pre-session forecasts after a broken green streak should default direction confidence to 'low' rather than 'med' until the first 30min of RTH confirms — the regime-shift read is right, but the continuation-vs-reversal coin flip is still open
